title: Kong proxies HTTP request to Realtime service on /realtime/v1
description: GET /realtime/v1/ through Kong. Realtime should respond (even if with an error about missing parameters). This verifies Kong routes to the Realtime service correctly. Full WebSocket upgrade testing requires a dedicated WS client — this test validates the HTTP layer of the route.
author: dlesieur
notes: This tests HTTP routing only. Full WebSocket testing (upgrade, subscribe, receive events) requires a dedicated executor — marked as Phase 3 in the QA roadmap. Set active once Kong + Realtime are both running.
